paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, representing a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from PR Newswire on July 23, 2026, regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. This news item is the only one reported in the last 24 hours, indicating a relatively quiet period for news about the company.

In terms of filings, there have been 25 total filings, including one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form filed on July 21, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
